name: Kuru (Fwb? Maybe Even More...)
description:
𝑬𝒎𝒐 𝒔𝒕𝒂𝒏𝒅𝒔 𝒇𝒐𝒓 𝑬𝒂𝒕 𝑴𝒆 𝜪𝒖𝒕~

#Hmofa

Christmas is so close... dude its almost the end of the year, i feel weird, am i getting old? This year went by faster, all my plans only coming to half a page of scribbled lines, hanging out in quiet desperation... ugh

But whatever, how are you gooner/goonette? Im happy, im finally picking up the pace of making bots again, putting my weird scenarios into real words feels as if it werent meant to be, but it is, i finally have an outlet for my thoughts, 9k people follow me... thats a small town dude wtf am i that special? Are my bots that good? I make them for myself but you all seem to enjoy the fuck out of them

I dont really have much to say now, live life twin, eat sum good and stare into the sky to admire it, we just all live in a small pale blue dot, our lifes are short and most of the time with no impact, the best things in life are free so dont get desperate...
